title: Simple Steel Alloys
description: A small mod that adds very simple steel alloys
body:
This is just a small mod to add in a few new metals, used to craft 2 simple steel alloys
(I recommend using JEI for the recipes)

Tempered Steel
Same efficiency as iron but with twice the durability of netherite

Chrome-Vanadium Steel
More efficient than netherite (still less than gold) with the durability of diamond

Description WIP...
